reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. NIce addition to the train set Right price and on time delivery. The train tracks are a perfect match for the train set and snap together easily. Alignment of the track height at the joints needs to be carefully done to avoid derailing the very light weight rail cars, but once set up properly, they are great. Review 2: rating 5.0. Fit and cheaper Fit in with the set that I got from one of the biggest big box and cheaper. Shipping is fast too. Same product at better price. Review 3: rating 4.0. exactly as expected I have the e-z track already and these extensions worked great. You don't have to deal with bedrolls and uneven floors as much, the only downside is that the plastic track bed transfers more track noise to the material below, so I still put track roll under the plastic. Review 4: rating 5.0. A Kid At Heart I am a retired man recently widowed. While going thru my wife's belongings I came across my HO steam engine and my Bachman Spectrum passenger cars. I got excited and decided to put it under the Christmas tree this year. I tested it to see if it still runs and found that the only track I had was 2 9" straight tracks which was enough to move the engine back and forth. So now I needed track.. I never thought Amazon would sell track and sure enough they do. I like... Review 5: rating 4.0. Team effort assembly The help of my 6 and 8 year old grandchildren was required to put this track together. They were able to show me how to make this work. Assembly assisted with my "bonding" efforts a lot. I'm sure that I could not have put this track together without their engineering skills. I should have ordered more track and several variations and will do so after Christmas. Maybe then the grandkids will let me play with the train. Review 6: rating 4.0. Team effort assembly The help of my 6 and 8 year old grandchildren was required to put this track together. They were able to show me how to make this work. Assembly assisted with my "bonding" efforts a lot. I'm sure that I could not have put this track together without their engineering skills. I should have ordered more track and several variations and will do so after Christmas. Maybe then the grandkids will let me play with the train. Review 7: rating 1.0. A total waste of money Information on site was misleading. Total wast of money. Thomas train only lasted 3 hours. This product should be discontinued Review 8: rating 2.0. bumpy tracks Bought for my 5 yr old grandson. Connecting tracks together is very difficult. The track guides actually move when trying to re-assemble. Needed a plier to pull them back to even, yet, there are stil minor gaps on the track which sometimes derails the train. Review 9: rating 1.0. WARNING: CONTAINS LEAD; KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN In tiny print at the bottom of the package, partially hidden by the product itself is: "WARNING THIS PRODUCT CONTAINS LEAD. MAY BE HARMFUL IF EATEN OR CHEWED. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN." The only way to do that is to return it, or better yet don't buy it.

I find it hard to believe they would sell a product that many people purchase for children that contains lead, but this is what it says. If you are conc... Review 10: rating 2.0. Speed Control failure I bought 2 bachmann train sets for Christmas. Both speed controllers failed within 1 day. One was returned to Bachmann for repair with a 4-6 week wait. With 2 failures, it would appear to be a manufacturing issue. I don't understand why new controllers could not be sent out immediatley. Review 11: rating 3.0. Too many derailments... I need to upgrade to a more efficient track -- too many derailments -- my grandson (age 2) could easily put the train back on the tracks and he didn't mind putting the train back on again and again, but I found it frustrating . . . Review 12: rating 1.0. Was disappointed in the quality Was disappointed in the quality. Train will not stay on the track. This was not what we expected at all Review 13: rating 4.0. Four Stars Bought for grandson so he can expand his train tracks. Review 14: rating 2.0. Two Stars did not work with other tract Review 15: rating 3.0. Purchased this track as an add on to my son's ... Purchased this track as an add on to my son's train set. One piece is off set thus the train derailes as it passes over it. With one piece unusable the entire pack can't be used (uneven number of pieces). Review 16: rating 5.0. Five Stars Quality track and easy to assemble! Review 17: rating 5.0. Perfact to make your cheasey circle an oval or just add on Most new ho starter sets are a circle this will get the oval track that most of us had when we were kids. Like most things the manfactures cheaped it up and took peaces out. This pack puts em back. Review 18: rating 2.0. Three Stars They broke a few days after I bought them so they wouldn't connect to the other tracks anymore the little things that connect the tracks broke easily Review 19: rating 1.0. Only two pieces in the package Both the description and the package are lying about how many pieces included. It says 4 pieces but actually only gives 2. Very disappointing. Review 20: rating 5.0. Well constructed The track worked as advertised. It arrived in good shape and on time. the track snapped together with other track I have. Will continue to purchase these items.
persona: This customer values detailed, well-molded models that offer creative potential for customization and weathering, prioritizes build quality and accuracy over price, and is motivated by the hobbyist appeal of creating intricate, realistic displays, often seeking additional miniature accessories to enhance their builds.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Nice add on. Do you want to make your daughter and son in law pissed? BUY MORE TRACK!!! It takes up 1/4 of the living room. Next I'm getting him a drum set. That's love for you.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Larger than dollar tree brand Just what I was looking for.... well packaged and worked great? Review 2: rating 5.0. Nice I am so happy with this purchase.
I was looking for items to make a rustic but elegant table, and these wood slices are so right for coasters, whether you are serving water in goblets or glasses of wine.
Even my daughter was impressed with the simplistic beauty they added to the table. Review 3: rating 3.0. Okay, but half came cracked Very good for the price, however 5/12 of the slices cracked and the cracks continued to get bigger so i could not use them. So I guess in all they weren’t so good for the money Review 4: rating 3.0. Nice, but............ I wanted to make ornaments out of these. I put them in a cabinet for a few weeks and when I got them out to use them, 3 out of 12 had begun to crack and I was unable to use them. Very disappointed. Review 5: rating 5.0. Smoothness Great for projects. But they were not as smooth as the ones I bought at a craft store. I had to sand them smoother for my son, he does wood burning and these were too rough for the tip to glide with ease. Otherwise I liked them a lot. Review 6: rating 4.0. As advertised Given as gift, loved by recipient Review 7: rating 1.0. These split immediately after opening. No good. Every single one of these in the dozen that I purchased split just sitting on the counter overnight. As soon as they were taken out of the packaging if they were not already split they started splitting. Do not purchase this product!! Review 8: rating 1.0. Garbage- crack like crazy Absolute garbage!!!!! I am so upset with these. I buy them to make ornaments and have always gotten them elsewhere but they have been unavailable for my usual spot for months now, so I took a chance on these. They feel thin and papery compared to the ones I am used to, but I tried. Except for one, every single one has split!!! A few split while drilling holes which has never happened with the other brand, some cracked right in half and those painted ones. Th... Review 9: rating 5.0. Great material for crafts Super find for making ornaments! Didn't need priming and very easy to paint with acrylic and add ribbon. Review 10: rating 5.0. Happy customers! looove these so much! Much better quality than my previous order. Will be returning to purchase more of these specifically! Review 11: rating 4.0. Great for coasters I made coasters with these for Christmas and they worked out great. The only issue I had was since they’re natural, some of them had dark spots in the center so I wasn’t able to paint over them Review 12: rating 2.0. Not recommended Continued cracking after I painted and sealed them. Review 13: rating 3.0. Wouldn't use for wood burning I was hoping these would be fun to wood burn for decorative coasters but the grain is crazy in them. I tried sanding but it didnt help.

I figured I'd try using them as coasters without doing anything to them but the wood on the sides comes off. Overall I'm a bit dissapointed. Review 14: rating 5.0. Perfect for rustic-themed wedding reception! These coasters worked out great for our daughter's downsized "COVID wedding" held in our barn. They matched the rustic theme perfectly. Review 15: rating 4.0. Bought as coaster but would recommend for crafts instead. Not very absorbent I want to say that they're cute and match my house decor. I decided to use them as coaster but he water will seep straight through. I have to use 2 if i have an extra condensating cup. The rest I will use for christmas decorations for the kids. Review 16: rating 3.0. Decent Decent, but one already cracked for no apparent reason, and the bark on the outsides keeps crumbling off here and there for no good reason. Review 17: rating 4.0. Pretty but too many arrived broken I really like using these for decorating with candles, centerpieces etc. However all but 4 had large pieces of the bark broken off so couldn't use them. I specifically wanted the bark. They came packed in very thin bubble wrap but in box with other items that must have jostled and then broke the wood Review 18: rating 2.0. Cracked down middle unexpectedly Bought these to paint on for christmas gifts. Needless to say they were not cracked when I began painting on. Honestly a huge bummer. Maybe it was my acrylic paints but i doubt it Review 19: rating 2.0. Okay Doesn’t look real. But works good Review 20: rating 5.0. Great product for the money! I made Christmas ornaments out of these. The size is fantastic and quality was wonderful. Will buy again!
persona: This customer values high-quality, durable materials and well-crafted products that deliver on both aesthetic appeal and functionality; they are willing to pay for superior quality and are drawn to items that feel substantial, reliable, and suitable for meaningful, long-term use or gifting.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Great size! Every piece is beautiful! Love these so much I came back and bought more! They’re a great size and quality, not some small thin section of wood. These will make lovely, giftable crafts!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Black Widows I just received my Black Widow Scorpion pencils . I LOVE them ! They go on very smooth . I already loved the first Black Widows and now I am in love with these . I highly recommend these for anyone who wants a smooth pencil for coloring . It even seems they may have improved the quality if possible . I am very pleased and will order more in the future . I have other inexpensive and expensive pencils but these are my favorite ! Review 2: rating 5.0. I really like them. They are smooth to use & shade ... I received mine today. I really like them. They are smooth to use & shade beautiful.
I have the Black Widow set & am happy to now have this set. Review 3: rating 5.0. Awesome pencils! I LOVE the Black Widow pencils so I was so excited to see the second edition Scorpion set launch. I immediately ordered them and have to say I am not dissapointed! The colors are vibrant and very smooth! I would definately recommend these pencils. Review 4: rating 4.0. LOVE LOVE LOVE I received my pencils today and love them! I had the black widows but i own so many pencils, that i really didnt use them till today, and what a shame! The colors are gorgeous and some colors i havent seen before, and they seem to blend and layer fairly well...the only problem i see while working with them is there are still not enough colors!! Lol...PLEASE PLEASE come out with another 24 set soon!! And truly, for those of us that like to do really detailed picture... Review 5: rating 5.0. Love these! Love these new pencils! I received my Scorpions yesterday and I love, love, love them! The colors are beautiful, with such names as blood red, pig's ear and pastel purple. They come in a nice tin box another plus over the Black Widow Spider pencils. These will work nicely with them though, I can not wait to use them. Will post a finished picture. Review 6: rating 5.0. Love them!! I am so pleased with these pencils! They are awesome and i love the new colors. The scorpions & black widows have become one of my favorite sets and i have alot! I like having the names on the pencils too! One recommendation is to put the color names closer to the base of the pencils so the name will be visible on pencil for as long as possible.I hope you will come out with more colors! Review 7: rating 5.0. Five Stars I love love love these! Vibrant colors & so smooth & creamy! Review 8: rating 5.0. Great! I love these! The company listened to the customer feedback on the Black Widow pencils and put the name of the colors on the pencils this time. There is also a color chart on the inside cover of the tin. If you are a fan of the Black Widow pencils you need to purchase the new Scorpion pencils which are their newest colors. Just fantastic! Review 9: rating 4.0. GREAT PENCILS!! An awesome addition to any set, or perfect beginners set! Aside from the packing of my tin and how they arrived (pictures below, luckily no broken tips/pencils!) I LOVE these pencils! They lay and blend very nicely.....these pencils are great for amateurs & professionals alike! Review 10: rating 5.0. Awesome pencils! These are absolutely the ones to buy. Awesome pencils! They lay down the color absolutely beautifully. So very glad I ordered these pencils. They rank up with my Prisma's and Fiber Castells. Review 11: rating 5.0. Great supplementary set I say this is a great supplementary set because there is no black or white in this set and that is fine because it is the companion set to the Black Widow set. These pencils are smooth and vibrant, the hold a good point and they doubt give off too much dust. In this set they changed the writing from red to white most likely to make it easier to read and they included pencil names...definite improvements. I love the colors because there are some shades in this... Review 12: rating 5.0. Five Stars Vibrant colors.. no damage.. fast delivery! Review 13: rating 4.0. Great if you do not need a fine point, colors are vivid and spread easily as core is so soft. Very difficult to do a fine line with as the leads are very soft and so obtaining a fine point is next to impossible. Even when just sharpened it doesn't stay fine very long as it is so soft. The colors are very vivid. The names of the different colors are clever, instead of calling it "moss green" they call it "grub green" for example.
I did order the set in a box in... Review 14: rating 5.0. FEEL THE DIFFERENCE!! I purchased the original Black Widow and this new SCORPION Edition set. Both sets have different colors, and together -- WOW!!!
These pencils are SO creamy and so rich, they are a delight to use. I use a many different high end brands of colored pencils from Inktense to Prismacolor -- Black Widow is now my "go to" color pencil. I constantly recommend them to members of our coloring group, people at work, even neighbors. (Need a set for people to ... Review 15: rating 5.0. Awesome Pencils!! I bought these at the same time as the original set and I LOVE them! I like that this set has the colors labeled on the pencil, the original does not. I like the unusual color choices also, like the black-green. Please make a larger set!! They are smooth an lay down color easily with very little pressure. They work exactly as they were designed to!!! (if you don't know the genesis of these pencils, look them up - it's a cool story!) Review 16: rating 5.0. Lovely Vibrant Colors!! The Black Widow colored pencil set is everything is expected. The colors are lovely and vibrant. Review 17: rating 5.0. Worth every penny! These are wonderful pencils. They are soft, but not too soft and work very well on some paper that my Prismas are terrible on, and they have the color name on the pencil which I have found through trial and error is a MUST for me. I'm glad I purchased them but wish they came in larger sets. Review 18: rating 5.0. Great pencils! I have quite a few different brands of colored pencils,most are higher end, I am really impressed with these pencils , they are soft,lay down color easily without any pressure & the colors are great, I also have the black Widow set,very compatible. Review 19: rating 5.0. ... have both Black Widow pencil sets and they are great. I have both Black Widow pencil sets and they are great. Review 20: rating 5.0. Scorpion pencil crayons Get these and the smaller set of black widow. Fabulous colors. I am running out and need to buy more
persona: This customer prioritizes reliable performance and consistent quality, especially for creative tools that must deliver vibrant pigments and smooth functionality; they are highly sensitive to defects like broken cores or dry ink, and expect products to meet advertised standards, particularly for use in detailed or professional artistic applications.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Good set of pencils Nice and vivid colors. One pencil has a broken core.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Very bright! I’m a little disappointed that the adhesive doesn’t seem to be holding the whole string of lights. I’ve used a couple pieces of double sided sticky tape to hold those weak spots, but even that isn’t holding.
I do love the brightness of them, though, and will continue to use them. Review 2: rating 2.0. Adhesiveness is ineffective The brightness is awesome.
However, it will NOT stay attached to the machine. Review 3: rating 1.0. Not worth it cleaned and prepped site prior to attaching LED strip. Despite that the strip would not remain in place. It became more of a problem and finally had to be removed. Besides it didn't produce enough light to make any kind of difference
Better answer was to use a strong light close to my machine. Review 4: rating 5.0. The light works well. I mounted this light to my Janome sewing machine. I can now see my sewing much better. The original light just wasn't strong enough for my aging eyes. Review 5: rating 1.0. Doesn't stick well It doesn't stick well at all. The part nearest the neck of the light won't stick to the machine and the light shines in my face, not on my fabric. I would not buy this. Review 6: rating 2.0. this light is the worst I have ever used The tape did not stay put and I had to keep putting it back in place. I finally gave up and will not use it. I do nor recommend this light to a serious sewer Review 7: rating 5.0. Let there be light! Totally changed my sewing game. I have plenty of light in my studio, but my eyes are failing me and get worse every year. Even with the lights on and daylight streaming through the window, this light has made threading the needle, seeing the seam allowance lines, and overall sewing soooo much easier. Totally worth it if you're on the fence! Review 8: rating 5.0. Bought it for my girlfriend My girlfriend, who does quilting, always complained about the scarce light coming from her sewing machine. Everything else is great in her baby lock, but not so much the lighting, so I gave it a shot and bought it. I thought, since is an inexpensive item, what do I have to lose? She is very happy with her new accessory. She cut it to the proper length (please as the little manual says, don't do it while powered) applied to the body of the sewing machine wi... Review 9: rating 1.0. Doesn’t work consistently. Doesn’t work consistently. Will work for about 2 minutes then turn off. When it works, its bright and would be great for me IF IT WORKED every time. Very disappointed. Review 10: rating 2.0. Cutting this per instructions ruined this light There are several things I wanted to like about this light. The cons very much outweigh the pros. The directions are simple enough to follow. The adhesion and brightness were great when I tried it out. Then I cut it per the instructions and it went downhill from there. It hasn’t worked at all since the first cut. Directions say cut only on the black line btwn the copper dots. After the cut, not touching a copper dot, it would no longer ... Review 11: rating 4.0. Very bright! Light strip is very bright and directs the light right to where it's needed. It was a little tricky getting the strip installed due to the orientation of the cord and control switch. Different machine configurations may be easier or harder based on individual circumstances. Adhesion was good, except for the part closest to the power cord. A little more distance between the last light and the beginning of the power cord would have helped. Overall, it is very effective a ... Review 12: rating 3.0. Bright light but didn't stick well. Adhesive didn't stick well to my machine. May need to use super glue for permenant staying in place. I'll probably try another product. The extra light is great though. Review 13: rating 4.0. I like it but… I find the bright light helpful and would recommend it for that reason. Installing it was challenging and awkward; I needed help. Even though I carefully cleaned the surface and let dry overnight, the strip doesn’t adhere near the base. Review 14: rating 5.0. Good light Nice and bright. Very easy to trim and apply. Sticks on great.

I would recommend. Review 15: rating 1.0. Light-sewing Could could not get the light to stay on the underside of the sewing machine with my material when I put it through the sewing machine. Review 16: rating 2.0. Doesn’t stick It won’t stay. Adhesion is very very poor Review 17: rating 1.0. Soooo frustrating I ended up throwing this out. It wouldn’t stick to my machine. I cleaned the machine like it said in the directions but no matter what I did, it wouldn’t stay put. Review 18: rating 1.0. Didn't work When I got the light strip, I plugged it in to make sure it worked. Then I installed it and then it never worked. I tried different receptacles but no luck. I had to return it. Review 19: rating 1.0. Poor Performer Bought two of these for my sewing machines. After the first arrived and I installed it on my sewing machine I was thrilled with the brightness. Immediately bought a second for my other sewing machine. Only had them for a very short time when one string started to turn itself off. Have been unable to sit down and sew for an hour without the off on business. Have used the second machine very little but do not have hope that it will be much better. Skip this one an... Review 20: rating 4.0. It’s good I’m a very part time sewer (mostly hems). But I always added extra light around my machine. When looking to replace light bulb with a bright LED bulb I came across this. First I want to say the quality of the packaging is awesome. The inside item were packaged just as well. Clear instructions!! They really care about their product. I thought $20 was a lil to much for what I needed, but I needed this. I guess I paid for that fancy/quality packaging. Bottom line is it li...
persona: This customer prioritizes functional reliability and durability in sewing and crafting tools, values clear performance for specific tasks, and is willing to pay a premium for high-quality, precision-made products that deliver consistent results, but is quick to discontinue use or recommend against items that fail under expected conditions or don't meet stated purposes.
reference_output: rating 2.0. This light is not durable I loved this while it worked but today it developed a short so it goes on and off (mostly off) until you manipulate the wires. I cannot figure out how to tape it in the functional position. I will order another, cheaper strip to replace it as I didn’t realize how short lived it could be (purchased July of 21; needs replacing just 6 months later.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Great idea, poor quality I wish I could write a positive review, especially after finding a lovely message from the small business owner in the box. Alas.

Most pens in the set were fine, but In a couple the pain was very thin (or the cartridge inside broken) and they were leaking when my son was drawing. The caps are way too tight for pens, so a 7 y.o. couldn’t take them off. We kept playing the “Mom, please take the cap off” game for three days in the row. And then the di... Review 2: rating 5.0. Very happy Great! Fast delivery and work exactly as described! Very happy! Review 3: rating 2.0. Painful ridged caps. Cool colors though. The quality of the actual paint seems ok but the caps have ridges that make it extremely painful and hard to remove. It limits my drawing time bc it roughs up my fingers and palms. One of the pens had a hard dry tip for my second use even though paint pours out when I press the tip. Overall, it’s the painful caps that will keep me from purchasing these again. Review 4: rating 5.0. Great value! Very happy with the quality for the price. These are the 3rd brand of paint pens I’ve attempted to use to draw designs on my husband’s skateboard. Grip tape is like sandpaper- very destructive to pens in general, but these held up really nice!! Also very blendable and good range of color. This was my first day using, so not sure about longevity but I am pleased! Review 5: rating 1.0. Do not recommend for rock painting These paint markers bleed into each other. Doesn't matter which color. I've let them dry for a day, put in the oven, etc.. they always bleed. And then the other color gets absorbed into the next colors tip. I was very unimpressed. Review 6: rating 2.0. Just ok sadly I purchased these for a Mother’s Day project. When I opened them one of the markers tops was cracked and in turn it had dried out and never worked. At first these seemed great. My dark green pen the started to leak everywhere. The tip got pressed in and didn’t come back out properly so I had to throw that one out. After using them all week to complete my project two or three other pens started to dry out even when shaken up. The paint started to come out watery and one ... Review 7: rating 1.0. Don’t waste your money. Product did not flow smoothly. Leaked and globbed all over my project causing me to have to redo it. Not worth the money! Review 8: rating 3.0. Fairly good and lots of applicationa They work great, vibrant colors
Unfortunately we had the yellow somehow opened and leaked. Seems to be a problem even with another brand we tried. Review 9: rating 5.0. Good quality and value My son really likes this set. The pens work well and the colors look great. He did say the gold is more of a dark yellow but chalk that up to personal preference. Overall a great purchase. Review 10: rating 5.0. Water based ink? So when I first opened this product. On big bold letters on the front of the package it says “water based ink” so I contacted the seller to get a replacement thinking I got the wrong item. I get the same thing a few days later, so I decided to open the package up and the pens say oil based ink and I work as oil based pens. I am new to the art world but I’m not sure they can be both oil based and water based at the same time? So I assume it is just a miss print of sor... Review 11: rating 5.0. Great Paint Markers This is my first time using paint markers. They are so easy to use and offer great coverage. The range of colors make this non artistic crafter’s ( me) art work have so much depth.
These are medium point. Getting ready to order the thin point.
Dries quickly so I’ve finished so many projects! Review 12: rating 5.0. Great markers! Worked awesome on rocks for the kids. No runs. They don't stink. Great markers! Review 13: rating 5.0. Great flow These painting markers are better than most I have used. They cover very well. Review 14: rating 5.0. Great Gift Our 13 year old song got these as a gift and he loves them. The colors are bright and very clean lines Review 15: rating 4.0. Markers Good markers they don’t come off easy they are easy to use and great for coloring Review 16: rating 1.0. NOT Oil-Based as Advertised I bought these because they stated they were oil-based, but the package specifically says water-based. False advertising. Review 17: rating 3.0. Not For Artist It ruins out of ink quickly. If you buy thjs for artistic reasons do not. It's not worth it . If your writing on wood or metal works great. Review 18: rating 5.0. Just DO it! I LOVE these markers. Worked wonderfully. Review 19: rating 1.0. They leak Well a few of the pens weren’t put together correctly. And they leaked all over the others. Sadly I can’t recommend them based on this. Review 20: rating 2.0. Careful when opening!! Two pens blew up while we were opening them. Bummer.
persona: This customer values reliable performance and quality in art tools, especially for detailed work, and is willing to pay a premium for well-made brushes, though they may be disappointed by inconsistent product quality or leaking issues.
reference_output: rating 1.0. These pens all leak This is very disappointing, I bought these for a very good friend who is experienced with paint pens and she reported to me that these all leak.  Very, very disappointed.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. This was the biggest waste of my money by far This was the biggest waste of my money by far. i have made about 4 hats, following directions and video blogs on this item. it constantly breaks needles, and doesn't provide directions on how to change the needles. also where do all the broken bits go to???( i've tried to shake and wiggle it upsidedown when i replaced the broken needles. i was going to use this to make a bunch of hats for purchases but at this rate i'm just gonna have t... Review 2: rating 1.0. Frustration with dropping stiches This thing is frustrating. You can either get a brilliant garment or get a dropped stitch that ruins all the work before it. I put it away for the the warm weather and when I took it back out all it did was drop stitches. Really tired of it. Not worth the money Review 3: rating 4.0. Fun machine. This thing works great if you use compatible yarns. It might take a little experimenting to find yarns that work well with it.
I found out the hard way that it doesn't like cotton yarn (too much friction), but it works wonderful with smooth, worsted weight wool. It works best at knitting tubes. It can make flat panels, but knitting them is a bit more complicated. It knits in minutes what normally takes hours. I am very pleased with my purchase. Review 4: rating 4.0. You gotta have patience I wish I could love it, I only just like it. I have my own headwear company and I make all of my custom beanies on this. It can be wonderful at times, and absolutely suck at other times. The main problem is dropping stitches, to which I have figured out its the softness of the yarn. Worsted weight (4) is the number to use, but you have to be careful and find soft yarns. Anything relatively rough will leave you wanted to throw the machine across the room. I've ... Review 5: rating 5.0. Knitting Machine I have broken some of the knitting needles in my machine but my husband has been able to replace them when needed. The needles are kind of expensive. I have knitted a large number of hats on this machine and found that a medium thread works best. You do need to keep an eye on it so you don't drop a stitch. Over all I love it because it saves a lot of time. I can made a hat in about 15 mins. I also have the baby Express and love it for making baby hats and scarv... Review 6: rating 5.0. Great Value & Great Results! This is my second addi - purchased the large machine this time. They work very well for me - either with two strands of fingering or one worsted. I haven't tried anything heavier than aran yet.

If you really want to "crank out" some knitting, this is the way to go. Watch videos of comparisons to other lower priced machines, and you'll see the difference! Although these are made from plastic, they still are precision machines.
... Review 7: rating 2.0. which is great. However Made one garment then a bunch of needles started making noises and the handle was really hard to turn. The supplier accepted the item for a full refund, which is great. However, I had to ship it back on my dime. So...I am out that money. I won't purchase another machine. Review 8: rating 5.0. persona: This customer prioritizes functionality, durability, and precision in repair and crafting tools, consistently selecting products that perform reliably under pressure and are suitable for detailed, hands-on projects involving leather and binding materials, while also valuing clear instructions, proper tool compatibility, and long-term reliability over cost or convenience.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Product worked very well I used this to repair the spin/binding of a hardcover Barbie book that my wife has. The glue is in a nice squeezable bottle with spout and cap as shown on the Amazon ad. It flows with the consistence of an Elmers glue or wood glue so be careful when applying. After applying I also used the Lineco gummed book repair tape that I ordered through Amazon to repair the inside of the cover along the spine. Once this was complete I put two nylon straps with plastic buckles around the book. Just don't make the straps to tight or they may leave groves or pucker the outside of the binding, since the glue will probably start to seep into and soften the binding. Finally I stood the book straight up on the binding, and supported it on both sides, and left it for 24 hours. Everything worked fine. The binding and cover are fixed and all pages easily open. We're very happy with the results.

reference_output:
rating 3.0. I'm satisfied I'm satisfied with my purchase. I didn't buy it as an investment so I'm not concerned about its actual worth. From the description and reviews, I was aware that the coins were available in varying degrees of condition and that it would be a crapshoot as to what the condition of my coin might be.

As it is, all of the letterings are easily readable, or would be if I could read German. The relief on the head section of the coin looks better than the photo suggests.

So I am satisfied. I'm not thrilled because my coin doesn't look anywhere near as good as the one that is displayed in the ad, but I didn't expect it to.

I tried about 10 times with it laying down and could not get a straight cut especially at the start. I then tried standing it upright against a wall and it works a lot better. I can also see when I'm getting close to all the way around this way. I don't understand why it is so expensive for so little technology but I didn't want to waste my money on a cheaper one.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Big Box Size up for mounted 8x10 on 11x14 board This box came in handy when I looked for boxes to store 8x10 inch prints mounted on 11x14 mat boards. It has convenient name tag to organize all my photos whether it's inkjet prints or black and white prints. It's stackable. Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect Scrapbooking Box. I took a chance buying this online and love it. Up to 2 12x12 scrapbooking albums fit in this box. Also ideal to hold papers, stickers and scraps. Very sturdy! Review 3: rating 5.0. Scrapbook storage box [[ASIN:B0013Z9EBC Pioneer Jumbo Scrapbook Storage Box, Black]]

Arrived early, was packaged well and in good condition.
This box was just what I expected. I don't use it for storing a scrapbook, but rather for storing souvenirs and photographs that I have not organized yet. I'll probably need to order more boxes soon! Review 4: rating 4.0. Just what I needed I needed something to store newspapers collected on special dates, i.e. copy of the paper on date of birth of child etc. and this storage box was the perfect fit. Review 5: rating 2.0. Arrived crushed - twice This is an OK box, but I ordered it and it came completely crushed. Returned it, which was relatively hassle free, but then the next one came sort of crushed. For my needs, it wasn't worth the hassle of returning it a second time, but for a $10 cardboard box, I can't really recommend it. Review 6: rating 3.0. Beware of shipping The box itself is fine. Lightweight and attractive, but nothing special, and a bit flimsier than I was led to believe from the reviews. As another reviewer mentioned here, mine arrived completely crushed, and obviously the few air pillows tossed inside the shipping box didn't help. We're talking about sending a lightweight empty box inside a lightweight empty box, and it doesn't stand a chance if it gets buried in the UPS mountain. I would send it back and get a... Review 7: rating 5.0. Strong, Sturdy, and Durable This was exactly what I wanted, a respectful home for photos I wanted to store but not look at. I actually bought a second one later on for something else because I liked the box so much. It's elegant, the cardboard feels good in your hands and I love the little label slot. It also arrived earlier than I expected! Review 8: rating 5.0. Storage for scrapbook paper This is a very nice looking storage box. It's sturdy, the lid fits well and it looks good even if left out on a shelf. The large size makes it perfect for storing all those beautiful 12x12 sheets of paper I buy at the craft store. Review 9: rating 1.0. NOT acid free This is a cheap box and NOT acid free. The lining is black and when rubbed gently with a white kleenex, the black dye comes off on the kleenex. Over and over again. I finally gave up trying to get the kleenex to stay white. It is obviously a cheap black paper dyed in China. How this CA company can call it an acid free box, I'll never know. Horrible. Review 10: rating 5.0. Great Storage for Photos I purchased two of the Pioneer Jumbo Scrapbook storage boxes. They are constructed very well and have plenty of room to store my photos. Clean design and very appealing. Will purchase more if needed. Review 11: rating 5.0. Just what I needed! These photo boxes are perfect for storing large photos. The box fit my contents perfectly, seems sturdy/durable, and will protect my photos in storage. I would recommend this product. Review 12: rating 5.0. Perfect Storage for Memories (and whatever else you need stored) The last couple years, my husband and I have gone on two amazing road trips and brought back lots of fun souveniers... the newspaper that was delivered to our room at the cozy bed & breakfast, seashells from the beach, postcards from tourist sites we visited, random plastic/paper bags with the logos of places we shopped... I like to save these items because they jog the fun memories. While I love having them, they were ... Review 13: rating 5.0. Lovely Storage Box I love this box. I've been going through a bit of an organizational phase and bought three of these just to start. One is holding my 2011 bills, receipts, and tax papers; one is holding 2010; and the last is full of manilla envelopes of my boyfriend's old papers from high school. Since they fit perfectly in my Ikea Expedit bookshelf, I'm buying three more for other papers that need to be kept, but not displayed. Review 14: rating 5.0. Very Nice This is a very fashionable box to store photos (or whatever) in. It actually holds quite a bit. All of my random photos are stored in it. Review 15: rating 5.0. Great Large Photo Storage Box I have many oversized family photos that needed storing and a standard sized photo box doesn't cut it. This box is made out of a thin, yet firm and durable cardboard. The product label lists dimensions for the box, but they're measuring the outside of the box. The actual inside dimensions are 12 1/2" wide x 14 1/4" deep x 3 1/2" tall. So it will easily hold my oversized 10" x 13" family photos or 12" x 12" scrapbooking supplies.

Mine came ... Review 16: rating 5.0. Satisfied customer This was the largest box I could find for storing old photographs, e.g., 11 x 14, until they can be digitized. Arrived in good shape. About as sturdy as I would have expected for a product of this nature. Acid-free feature is excellent. Review 17: rating 1.0. Extremely and Bitterly Disappointed The speed of delivery cannot be faulted. The robustness and quality of the product, given the price, is flimsy (light shoe box) at best and not of archive standard. The real disappointment is that although it arrived in plastic wrapping once removed it was absolutely disgustingly covered in greasy finger marks ... completely and utterly useless as a gift. More annoying yet as I ponder is that it must have been wrapped prior to sending out and wh... Review 18: rating 3.0. Arrived bent When I spend $10 on a cardboard box, I expect it to be in good condition. When I opened it, it was bent, but usable. Not worth my time to return ship it, but I'm still disappointed. All in all, this box does it's job and is a good size to fit 12 by 12 paper plus some extra scraps and what have you. Review 19: rating 1.0. Dimmensions Incorrect. Did not work for me because the actual Box OUTER dimmensions are: 12 7/8 x 14 1/2 x 3 3/4 Review 20: rating 5.0. Very Nice Quality Box was received within promised timeframe and in perfect condition. persona: This customer prioritizes bulk value and versatility in products, especially for recurring creative or organizational needs, and is drawn to cost-effective, high-capacity items that support consistent, long-term use in educational or craft-focused settings.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. Great for saving school papers I have bought these in different colors for my 2 sons. I use them to save their school papers from each year in school. I have needed 2 boxes so far each year but these are the first 3 years of school and I've been overzealous about what I keep. I will eventually go through and clean out some things. But for now, 2 boxes/per kid, each year has worked great. They are sturdy, strong and able to stack multiple ones in the closet to save space.

I also have 1 for my scrapbooking paper and supplies and they are great. Only 1 of the 6 I have ordered has been broken in shipping. But Amazon was amazing about replacing it immediately.

reviews:

The product is solid, has good non-slip feet to keep it from sliding around, and has many helpful grid and angle guides. It's large enough to block a full 12x12 scrapbook page. I also like that it is multifunctional and can be used for more than just cutting. Safe to use as a work surface for inks and hot glue. Review 4: rating 1.0. Broken! It is strong enough to withstand pressure while cutting cardstock and other items but thin enough to hold all sorts of canvases and other media for my crafts. Review 11: rating 5.0. Great for precision cutting and cutting of circles/ovals/ scalloped designs. Great smooth surface for inking. Wipes clean with water or wipes. Glue easily removed with Undo and safe for hot glue. Very flexible tool. Review 12: rating 5.0. Great product Love this I wish they had a bigger one Review 13: rating 5.0. So Happy! Holds up better to cutting and other crafting tasks, and MUCH easier to clean, especially for the inevitable glue blobs that come from crafting - a razor blade and rubbing alcohol brings it back to brand new smooth and clean. Love that the grid lines are painted on the underside so they are not affected by cleaning, ink or paints. Also great for mixing inks or paint colors. A must-... Review 14: rating 5.0. Five Stars Product is very well made and exactly what I was hoping it would be. Review 15: rating 5.0. I love using this with my polymer clay I love using this with my polymer clay! It makes it easy to keep the sizes I want correct. Review 16: rating 5.0. very durable and good quality The product is very good and durable. I like it. Review 17: rating 5.0. The glass remains cool while she's working on it. This is important because her work area as it is happens to be where she wants it to be at the time. One day it might be in the living room in front of the heater, the next it might be in the kitchen. If the clay is getting to warm l... Review 18: rating 5.0. Works better than expected. This works better than my plastic cutting mats. It's bottom grabs onto my fast and doesn't slide around. Review 19: rating 5.0. Five Stars Really a worthwhile product for using with razor cut tools. Review 1: rating 2.0. Brush Quality The brush quality really disappointed me. I just started watercolor painting and i figured this was a great brand but my brushed came frayed and they didnt seem of high quality when i painted. I wouldn't recommend based of this experience, as i returned them. Review 2: rating 5.0. Solid set of brushes I bought these brushes to take to a watercolor painting retreat. The brushes are sturdy, easy to clean and comfortable to use. They come in a variety of sizes in round, flat, filbert and fan brushes. They come with a handy carrying case. I can see that a person would want to own a separate set just to use for their acrylic painting. Hint, hint--I'd love a second set! Review 3: rating 1.0. 4.00 set at Hobby Lobby better quality. This was supposed to be a gift for my daughters b-day tomorrow. Not only do they smell like someone used them and cleaned them with turpentine, but half of them are frayed. The caps put on them and bristles damaged. Really have seen 4.99 sets in better condition. Review 4: rating 5.0. Good quality. Good range of brush tips. Unexpected good quality for a very reasonable price. The tips pull back together just by shaking them when wet—just like a good to great brush should. Review 5: rating 1.0. I had no idea the brush handles would be so ... I had no idea the brush handles would be so long. I was not able to control the flow of paint with the size of these. Review 6: rating 5.0. Review 14: rating 5.0. Loving these for oil painting! I’m using them to paint in oils and they’re doing the trick! This under painting/blocking in was done in one session and in about a half of an hour. I’m loving the smoothness while allowing for great color transfer. For the price, I’m totally sold. There were a few wonky hairs here and there that I snipped, but this happens a lot with brushes and I’m certainly not holding it against them. I’m glad I got them and even if they don’t last “forever”, the pr... Review 15: rating 1.0. Strong chemical smell. Do not buy this. Five Stars Outstanding set of brushes. The only complaint is the chemical smell. Review 17: rating 5.0. Mont Marte Art Paint set Nice brushes for water coloring. Five Stars These are 10 times better than I expected! Review 19: rating 5.0. High Quality , Great deal Absolutely Beautiful brushes , I never expected such high quality for this price . Review 20: rating 5.0. Great quality and price I never write reviews, but these brushes are exactly what I like. I reordered them immediately. I am beyond pleased with the quality and really amazing price. I am a professional artist.
persona: This customer prioritizes product durability and performance over low price, and is highly sensitive to quality issues; they expect products to function properly from first use and are likely to avoid brands with poor reliability despite affordable pricing.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Brushes fell apart upon first use. BEWARE! Sad to say, I found these brushes to be completely useless. Upon the first use, the brushes began shedding fibers; one of them detaching from the ferrule in a clump.  The glowing reviews I see here online greatly surprise me. I advise everyone to steer clear of Mont Marte brushes.  The low price is doesn't matter if the product is unusable.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Great Product Awesome product. Colors and inks as described. Will purchase again when needed

Review 2: rating 1.0. disapointed very disapointed with this brand I wont buy this again

Review 3: rating 5.0. Great colors! Great alcohol inks. I am a newby to alcohol inks but I have been very impressed. Only thing I haven’t liked is the white acts differently and gets a little chunky.

Review 4: rating 1.0. Not what I expected Bottles are small, colors are not vibrant.

Review 5: rating 3.0. Not full bottles All the bottles are about 3/4 full. It’s not an expensive set by any means, but I do expect to get what I paid for.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Great inks! These are background images created on Yupo paper with alcohol inks.

Review 9: rating 5.0. Great product I had order these before and I wanted more colors

Review 10: rating 1.0. Waste of money. Very hard to use, strange colors - not vibrant at all.  Pay more and get Ranger inks.

Review 11: rating 4.0. Good Colors, But Some Spilled The colors are amazing and vibrant. However, the violet came with some spilled all over. It lost around 1/3 of the bottle.

Review 12: rating 1.0. BIG WASTE  OF MONEY I bought  this thinking  that  it would  help make  our resin really  stand out well it doesn't .I will  never  buy this ever again

Review 13: rating 3.0. Colors seem like they are water down I was really excited to try these, but when I did it seemed like the colors were water down.  I had to use a lot of droplets and still was not able to get that rich effect as another brand does.  I do like to have the variety of colors, that is fun.  I can still make it work.  But I am not sure if I'll buy again.

Review 14: rating 1.0. You definitely get what you pay for I did not like anything about these inks. From the poor quality pigmentation to the way that the bottles leak after opening, I hate that I wasted the money on these in an effort to be more budget conscious. I will gladly spend the extra money from now on to get a higher quality product.

Review 15: rating 1.0. Spend a little more for better quality ink Cheap product. Doesn’t work well with epoxy and tumblers. The ink made the epoxy repel from the cup leaving fish eyes. Not happy with this purchase.

Review 16: rating 4.0. Great for the money. Considering most other inks are $4+ each I thought I’d give these a try. Actually a very good product for the price! They do seem a little thin to me but they serve their purpose. There isn’t really a true red out of them. And all of the purples are very similar but I can’t complain too much with the price.

Review 17: rating 1.0. Evaporated and leaked [[VIDEOID:1f68ec5feacaee0a2254e3c8273ee799]] Inks are evaporated and one leaked close to 3 ml,if I could get a refund on this and keep the product I would,colors are fantastic but I will not purchase again.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Above expectations I was so excited to get this pack of alcohol ink set so I used it right away. Easy to use, colors are vibrant and I can’t wait to use the other colors. Great product for the price.

Review 19: rating 1.0. Alcohol ink or colored water??? The WORST ALCOHOL ink I’ve ever used !! Very dissatisfied !!!! Colors are definitely NOT vibrant nor do they mix well with epoxy AT ALL! I ruined 2 different tumblers with this stuff! I should of learned after the first cup ! It’s very watered down!! But I thought maybe it was something I did and so I attempted to use it Again and got the sAme results!  An ugly mess ! Do NOT buy!!

Review 20: rating 3.0. Great inks for a beginner with lots of colors and affordable I love the color selection in this color pack and the price was very affordable for alcohol inks.  Once you've gone beyond the beginner's, stage though you'll probably want to graduate to a more expensive ink.  These inks are more difficult to work with as they tend to be watery and move around your surface more quickly than you would like.  The colors do seem to be quite as vibrant as more expensive inks.
persona: This customer prioritizes ease of use, product quality, and value for money, often purchasing items that support creative activities and are suitable for shared use, with a preference for reliable, well-performing tools that enhance crafting experiences.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Vibrant colors I love the vibrant colors. Easy to use for beginners. Would highly recommend

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. awesome adhesive!! This really works great for all my wall decals. #1 trick is to oil your hands with vaseline or shea butter otherwise its hard to wash the adhesive off...lol...know this by experience...It does hold very well even on my textured walls but humidity will affect how long it sticks. I just peel back the decal from the wall where it isn't sticking anymore and spray the back of the decal and the wall letting it dry first on both before pressing it back into place. I love ... Review 2: rating 5.0. Good for cutting mats I use this to refresh the adhesive on my cutting mat periodically. I use the mat in a computer-controlled cutting machine. With fresh Easy Tack, the work stays in place a lot better, but still peels off when the cutting is done. As other reviewers have noted, the spray will go all over the place, so use it outdoors. Review 3: rating 5.0. Works great! Use this on the brother scan and cut ... Works great! Use this on the brother scan and cut mat to adhere paper to cut and then peel off and it has just the right amount of tack to hold it in place while at the same time being easy to remove with barely any residue! Would definitely recommend! Review 4: rating 5.0. Works great I work with different crafts and this is perfect for spraying and then sprinkling glitter. It works wonderfully for me. Review 5: rating 5.0. Good tack spray The ability to apply to stencil and peel them off makes this very handy. We love it! Review 6: rating 5.0. Make Cricut Mats sticky again. I purchased this item to make my Cricut mats sticky again. I taped over the edges, sprayed a layer outside and let it dry. Makes mats new again. Review 7: rating 5.0. Works Great! Works great! For what I wanted it for, it works perfectly. I use this frequently and it never fails me. Review 8: rating 5.0. Does very well for light duty and repeated repositioning. Used this spray to make a job chart for my 4 year old. It is working well. I sprayed it on some craft foam and am using slips of paper with one job on each. The items get moved every day, and so far I've had it for about two weeks, and it is still tacky. I may have to respray it, but for the price difference between this and the 3M repositionable, it had been perfect for my needs. Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect. I absolutely love this stuff. I use it to make my Silhouette Curio mats re stick. It just needs a light mist and it works great. I have accidentally oversprayed once or twice, and my paper ripped. But all I had to do to fix it was basically blot it with paper. Since I use it on such a small area and it only takes literally one second, I use it inside, and I've never had a problem with fumes, or it sticking to everything. But since I use it inside, I don't usually turn it up... Review 10: rating 5.0. ... Scan And Cut and it uses the sticky mat like my old Cricut I have a Brother Scan And Cut and it uses the sticky mat like my old Cricut. Well those sticky mats
get expensive and some one told me to use the Krylon Easy Tack on my mats which saves loads of money.
Have even bought it as gifts for friends. This is a five star winner. Review 11: rating 5.0. Works perfectly to restore ScanNCut sheets This adhesive has worked perfectly so far. I use it to restore my ScanNCut high-tack sheets after they've been cleaned. Spray lightly and be sure to spray outside or in a very well-ventilated area. Review 12: rating 5.0. Five Stars works great for reacting the scan cut mats Review 13: rating 5.0. Five Stars Good stuff, just tacky enough without leaving a mess! Review 14: rating 5.0. Keeps on working, repositionable stick over and over. My purpose for this item is to keep my cutting mats for my electronic cutting machine tacky after I give it a good cleaning. No need to spray on too much or it will stick too much too. Needs a little bit of time to settle in, maybe 10 - 15 mins.. It keep on and on working until you need to give your mat another deep cleaning. Review 15: rating 5.0. Five Stars I used this to afex cork tiles to a painted wall, and it worked well for that. Review 16: rating 4.0. great for airbrush stencils a good low tack adhesive, I have used this often for applying stencils to fabrics for airbrushing...no stains, no sticking, works great. Review 17: rating 5.0. Great for mylar stencils! Works great on mylar stencil. ONLY spray the back side (downside) of the mylar stencil. Leaves a sticky surface much like the glue on a post-it. Holds stencil in place firmly for brushing, then allows stencil to be lifted without damaging paint below or leaving residue on painted surface. Needs to be refreshed after a few days, just re-spray. Review 18: rating 5.0. Works excellent for resticking kri-cut panals. I bought this for a school event to use the kri-cut. It works excellent. Now I see other uses around the home. Review 19: rating 5.0. Use on Cricut or Silhouette mats If you use Cricut or Silhouette mats...you need this...makes your mats go a long way. No problems...just tape the outer edge and spray. Great! Review 20: rating 1.0. Followed the instructions to the T and the posters I ... Followed the instructions to the T and the posters I put up didn't even last a day on the wall. reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great feeling hooks! Feel great! So much different than just the metal ones. Great assortment for your crochet needs!

Review 2: rating 2.0. Disappointed Wanted to like these very much as I have been wanting a comfortable handle.  However, these seem to not allow the yarn to slide smoothly off.  Not sure if it is the finish on the hooks themselves or what.  Would like to return but will now spend the money on name brand product.

Review 3: rating 5.0. Good for people with arthritis “I had purchased a set a while back for myself and am pretty happy with it. I got this set for my friend as a gift and I noticed the needles are longer. I'm happy that the company takes customer comments and suggestions seriously since I had commented about the length of the needles when using thick yarn. Great improvement. Might get another set. My hands have improved tremendously.”

Review 4: rating 5.0. AWESOME HOOKS!!!! I love these hooks...they are comfortable to use and have the sizes clearly marked on each one...the bright colors are so cheerful...they are perfect...Thank you so much!!!!

Review 5: rating 4.0. Great hooks for the price with caveats. I bought these hooks because I had carpal tunnel surgery in both of my hands 21 years ago,  I liked the fact that I was purchasing from a military mom owned company and that the hooks were clearly marked and color coded with the sizes; the price is quite reasonable for crochet hooks of good quality. However, the crochet hook throat on the larger hooks, sizes I - L is much shorter than that of the smaller sizes. Over all they are shorter than th...

Review 6: rating 5.0. These have become my go-to hooks! Great price, great hooks! I bought these last month on sale. These are tapered hooks (Boye style) not inline (Susan Bates style. ) The handles are so comfortable that I can crochet for 4± hours without taking a break. A rarely seen 7 hook is included this set. It took me awhile to get used to feel of the handles and I noticed my tension and hand hold has improved. I worked on 2 afghans with the hooks and it was a lot easier. I love how these hooks ha...

Review 7: rating 5.0. Quite pleased! I am bery pleased with these hooks.  I am currently using the "G" hook with a yarn that is very "splitty" but happily, the hooks are smooth and handles the yarn well.  The rubberized end is very comfortable to the hand.  I haven't had a long session with these hooks but I think that the handle and heft of the hook will be less tiring to use.

Review 8: rating 1.0. Mixed feelings I like the handles. They’re soft without being too soft. I think they could be just a little bigger for more comfort, but in all they’re good. The shaft and neck of some are horrible. I have some that are rough so yarn catches. I have some with scratches in the neck so yarn really catches and frays a bit. Company is aware and has been in “processing” for 2 weeks. It’s taking longer to process than it did to get to me in the first place. You get what you pay for. I shou...

Review 9: rating 5.0. Exactly what I wanted! I crochet quite a bit. I have a little Etsy business and crocheting is one of my favorite things to do. I was starting to have some pain in my wrist and hands and it was suggested to me that I try some ergonomic hooks. As I was looking on Amazon I really liked the reviews that were said about these Hooks and so I decided to try them. reference_output: rating 4.0. Perfect for beginers and people getting back into sculpting This is a good set that gives you a good variety of tools. The one thing you should be warned about is that the plastic tools are brittle and can easily be broken in the bag. I've already broken one that was my favorite it was a long narrow spatula tool with a ball tool on the other end. So keep that in mind and the plastic ball tools aren't completely smooth so they will leave texture . The metal and silicone tools are the best though.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. Definitely featured packed for the money! I was using a bottom of the line Janome Mystyle that needs to go in repair. I decided to get this machine as a backup because it definitely has more features and was priced $100 less that my Janome that I got three years ago! I do a lot of free motion quilting.

I just got it today. A lot of things irked me at first, but with some minor problem solving everything must be just a learning curve thing. I thought the quilting table was a little unstable at first. Whenever I weighted my hand on the far left side it would tilt the machine... then I was more careful about seating the table at the machine and made sure that the legs were properly locked out and I didn't have a problem. The threading mechanism was definitely a good thing to have, but it's definitely another learning curve item. It took me several tries to do it successfully. I love the way the bobbin is filled and threaded. I like to use the Supreme Slider for free motion quilting but the throat space was a little small for it. Luckily I had an old one that I had accidently chewed up the edge, so I just sliced the chewed up edge and it fit in the throat space just fine. Love the needle position feature.

I usually set the stitch length to 0 to free motion quilt, but wasn't able to get it down to 0. I had to fiddle with the thread tension for awhile, but I even with fiddling I never got any severe loops or problems. In fact, it was more consistent with good stitch quality than the Janome. I changed out the foot to the included free motion quilt foot. I found I wasn't able to quilt as accurately than my Janome. The hopping mechanism of the foot would advance the quilt on it's own which means I had to use more muscle tension to keep handle the stitching. The LED light produced glare on white fabric, and the clear plastic on the foot made the needle position difficult to see. I found that I had to crane my neck more to be right on top of it to quilt accurately. Again, this is probably just a learning curve thing. I definitely like the incandescent light on the Janome better because the lighting is more diffuse and covers a larger area thus no glare on white fabric.

I logged onto Amazon today to print a copy of the invoice to keep with my warranty. I noticed that they had lowered the price $30. So I opened up a Help chat session and they proceeded to refund the $30 plus tax! I LOVE AMAZON!

persona: This customer prioritizes product performance and ease of use in crafting projects, values strong adhesion and reliable functionality, and is drawn to versatile, high-quality materials that enhance their creative work, with little concern for price if the product delivers consistent results and professional outcomes.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Beware of this tool For those who purchased this heat tool and for others considering purchasing it, I must tell my experience with this product. I recently purchased this heat gun tool as I use it while embossing some of my homemade greeting cards. I used it breifly shortly after I purchased it and did not notice any burning odor or smoke coming from the gun. Last night I was working and notice some smoke.  At first I thought the very light smoke was possibly common since the gun was new. I l turned the heat gun off and left it cool then again was using it for my craft project, before I knew it the gun was smoking greatly. I turned it off and again and as I did I notice  the same thing some of you users notice, the barrel was smoking. Almost immediately the gun caught fire. Flame came out of the the nozzle and continued to burn what seemed to be a few minutes. I can't say for sure as I was so startled by the situation I could only think about keeping the flame away from any flameable objects and to keep the flame away from me to prevent injury. I am grateful that the damage was contained only to the product itslf. I plan to write to the manufacturer about this problem before someone DOES get hurt.  I don't know the cause of the fire as the gun was too damaged upon inspection to determine whether the barrel was aligned improperly or if the gun had a defect which caused it to over heat. Reguardless of the cause, I want to warn anyone using the  piece of equipment to PLEASE be very careful!!!m

Don’t waste your money on the Ranger brand if you plan on doing embossing. Review 13: rating 3.0. Dirty Is the stamp pad supposed to come dirty looking? Review 14: rating 4.0. We did a card making project and this was perfect for embossing We did a card making project and this was perfect for embossing. It did dry out a bit quicker than expected but overall its great. Review 15: rating 5.0. Must have for heat embossing Easy to use, and makes incredible stamp work. Amazon has a very fair listing price as well. Important note: This is a 1 pack, not a 2 pack! Review 16: rating 5.0. Good stuff! I really like this versa mark. I bought it to try to make some of my own color-me-papers. I haven't done that yet....but I will. I stamped and then embossed. You will love it. Review 17: rating 5.0. Must have Embossers take note. This product is a must have to do those extra steps of heat embossing. I do not know if there are other products out there so I cannot compare. Review 18: rating 5.0. VersaMark for embossing. This VersaMark pad is an essential part of my scrapbook supplies. Purchasing through Amazon saved me a trip to Michaels where I spend way too much. :) Review 19: rating 5.0. and I cant get a great stamp, I have not had a single issue ... I have tried LOTS of different embossing pads, NONE work well, they kind of work halfway, and I cant get a great stamp, I have not had a single issue with versamark ink, it is nice and sticky and thick which is a weird thing to say, but it is HANDS DOWN the ONLY embossing ink I will ever use again. Review 20: rating 5.0. Excellent. This VersaMark Pigment Inkpad is perfect for embossing using detail powders. Images stamp perfectly every time. I always clean my stamp if using VersaMark Inkpad and color ink. Other option is to have 2 of VersaMark Inkpads - one for clear stamping and one for color stamping.
persona: This customer prioritizes versatility, precision, and long-term value in crafting supplies, favoring products that enable creative experimentation, easy positioning, and durable performance, while appreciating comprehensive kits and thoughtful accessories that enhance usability and organization.
reference_output: rating 5.0. One of the best products out there! With the Corona Virus shutting down so many businesses, I have had to order this on line.  (Our local Art Supply store is shut down) Best product I have found to do embossing and chalk stamping.  Perfectly clear on it's own, so it Does not effect the color you are using.  Great for even very fine embossing powders.  Excellent detail.  I also stamp with the Versa Mark, and then use a cotton ball to rub chaulk dust into the image to get rainbow effects, and it works perfectly without smudging or blurring.  One very nice "trick" I have used is to press a dried leaf into the Versa Mark pad, and then sprinkle with gold embossing powder and then use a heat gun on it.  The Versa ?Mark holds the powder onto the leaf without having it blow off, and allows me to CAREFULLY melt the embossing powder onto the leaf.  Love this stuff!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. It surpasses all my expectations! I absolutely LOVE using this resin!
I recently compared it to two other brands, one was a very well known one.
This resin outshined them both in smell, ease of use, bubbles, working time, and mixing!
I use resin for a coat on paintings, and jewelry, and other projects. Review 2: rating 1.0. Awful Awful, I’ve used a lot of different brands and this one is so far the worst, it’s super watery and drips off the cup while on the turner and no matter what I do all there is after it’s dry are gigantic fisheyes Review 3: rating 5.0. Very happy with this resin. Set VERY quickly. Not much work time but great if you’re trying get a pyramid done in one day. Very few bubbles of stirred gently, and come out with heat application. Review 4: rating 5.0. Better than the cheaper stuff After buying another product that was cheaper. I learned my lesson. This resin is more clear and cures harder. I will be buying more as soon as I can afford it! Review 5: rating 5.0. Beautiful, clear resin I love this product. It mixes together so easily and they are not over stating when they say it is crystal clear. Very few bubbles and almost all dissipate on their own. I hit it with the torch a few times just in case but I don't really think it needed it. You have a long work time with this. I didn't have an issue with it starting to seize up too quickly like I have with other brands. Love it! Review 6: rating 1.0. Not self leveling; does not harden This is the third resin I’ve tried and easily the worst. Less expensive than Art Resin and I know why. Unlike Art Resin (which costs far more) this does NOT self level. I tried pouring it on ceramic tiles ON A FLAT SURFACE and to my astonishment there were areas where the mixture was lumpy and in some cases did not touch. I had to keep adding more of the (carefully mixed) resin. I used a metal cocktail stirrer to spread. I followed all directions, m... Review 7: rating 5.0. Great Resin I use this to encase rocks or shells in a tray for decorative use. It is great. Beautiful finish, easy to work with few or no bubbles (some heat will almost guarantee no bubbles). Very usable working time and is ready to display in less than 24 hours. It's also durable...I've used my projects as stands for condiments, plants, etc.
I've used other resins, and this is by far the best...no comparison.
One caution...make sure it is very well mixed! Don't rush it. Review 8: rating 5.0. Works for me! This is the only resin epoxy I have ever used besides some UV resin I bought off of Wish.
After about half an hour, it begins to stiffen, so it’s wise to have your design layed out ahead of time. I’ve always heard resin epoxy has noxious fumes but this has none. Review 9: rating 2.0. Disappointed Unfortunately the resin was dull and had no shine..silicone mold gave it the finished product a matte look. Disappointed Review 10: rating 5.0. Love it! By far my favorite resin I've tried, very clear, little to no bubbles, mixes easily, and very minimal odor. Review 11: rating 1.0. Can’t use Allergic reaction, severe rash on arms and neck. Even with gloves and mask Review 12: rating 1.0. Waste of Money Material did not harden even after following directions to the letter. A waste of money Review 13: rating 1.0. Would not recommend Resin did not absorb in the canvas on two of my glass design projects. Weeped all over the plastic liner and my table is level. Review 14: rating 5.0. I had to add a bit more hardener I purchased this product to make jewelry and coasters ashtrays etc I absolutely love this epoxy high quality very crystal clear well use again. Review 15: rating 5.0. Crystal clear easy to work with slow dri It's really perfect for what it is. Just make sure you give it adequate time to cure. Directions to 24 hours, it's really closer to 48 before it's completely cured. Review 16: rating 5.0. Easy and great value! Easy to use and CLEAR Review 17: rating 5.0. Best of the Best I've used about 8 different brands and this is by far the BEST! It's perfectly clear, easy to use due to it being a thinner than others and hardens nicely! I will probably use another brand again! Just wish it was offered in a value size!!!!! Review 18: rating 5.0. Be careful to measure exact Hard finding a good measuring cup, but nonetheless this is great to use. Very minimal bubbles- only experienced one bubble through the whole use. Waited to review to test how it holds up and so far so good. Review 19: rating 5.0. Easy! This is so easy to use with easy clean up Review 20: rating 5.0. Good resin Very good resin. Very few micro bubbles. Always dried clear and smooth. I would get this product again

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Handy and Easy To Use I needed a Quilter's Cut'n Press as I had used my old one so much the fabric wore out from ironing so much. It did't upset me that my old one wore out I had only had it for 10+ years. If you are in a small sewing space these are wonderful. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great convenience! I take a quilting project with me when we travel. This cutting/pressing mat is great for traveling, since it fits into my machine case perfectly!! Review 3: rating 4.0. good product This board is what any experienced sewer would expect. You can iron and pin on one side and use your rotary cutter on the other. Good for easy portability to a class or to use in a small Sewing area. Review 4: rating 5.0. Perfect I ordered this to use when we have the rv out and it works perfectly to iron my quilt blocks and fabric and I can flip it over and rotary cut on the other side. And it doesn't take. Up much room Review 5: rating 5.0. Very pleased. I love the size for when I'm working on small patchwork. Sits right beside my sewing machine. I may end up purchasing the rectangular one for larger projects. Review 6: rating 5.0. Very useful Works wonderfully for taking small projects away from home. It also allows me to do hand projects outside of my sewing room Review 7: rating 5.0. Such a handy thing to have !!! I make a lot of quilts, and often need to trim little pieces or use my mini iron to press out seams. I keep this on a small table right by my sewing machine. It is just the right size for it !!! Review 8: rating 4.0. Good Tool this is a good tool when traveling to my quilting bee group. table space is limited and cut and press gives me enough space to work comfortably, and fits in my weekender on wheels.also works well in my lap. Review 9: rating 5.0. Quilting project gift It is just what I wanted and needed for my quilting projects and the ease of it being portable for me. Review 10: rating 4.0. June Tailor's Quilter's Cut'n Press I have already used one of these. The big problem is that if it gets wet, the board underneath the padding can stain the top. Review 11: rating 4.0. Practical Convenient to use when traveling. Easy to pack, and will recommend to all my friends and family. Good to have on hand. Review 12: rating 5.0. Easy, compact cutting and pressing surface. Perfect for pressing quilt seams as you go! The handle is a little sharp so I covered it with an empty toilet tissue roll with foam inside! Not really a problem since I'm not carrying it around, but just a 'heads up' for those who might be!!
It's also nice that both sides have clear measurements so you can see if your block is square! I recommend this product from this company. Review 13: rating 5.0. June Taylor quilter's cut n press Fantastic, easy to use, compact, and a welcome addition to my craft studio,as I can keep it next to my machine Review 14: rating 5.0. Great product Works for small projects, taking to a quilt retreat and eliminates having to bring the large and bulky stuff. Easy to goat in your machine carrier. Review 15: rating 5.0. Love this tool for quilting I have a limited amount of space for my quilting, so I have to constantly go back and forth between setting up my cutting board, then taking it down to set up the sewing machine, then getting up to go to the ironing board. I can set up the Cut'n Press next to my machine and have it right at hand when I need to quickly press a seam, or by flipping it over quickly make a cut. I also purchased a travel steam iron to use with the Cut'n Press and it's a great... Review 16: rating 5.0. Awesome, versatile board- Cut and Press- just don't mix up the sides :) What's better than being able to cut and press with the same board? I have limited space for crafting, and this is a perfect tool for my card crafting and quilting projects. Review 17: rating 5.0. So Handy This is such a helpful device for quilters. One side is for cutting and one for ironing as it says. I put this on my lowered ironing board and can cut my blocks then iron them without leaving the sewing machine. It's light weight and seems very well made. I'm very pleased with this dual use item.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional versatility and ergonomic design in their purchases, seeking tools that support adaptability and reduce physical strain, especially for tasks requiring repeated use or alternative hand usage.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Handy Board I use this all the time between my cutting board and sewing machine. It's perfect for pressing as-you-go.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Leverback earring wires I exchange the earring wires from previously purchased earrings that may cause an allergic reaction. Lets me enjoy a wider range of earrings.
